Then RHS = √2 [A·(√2/2)(sin x - cos x) + B·(√2/2)(cos x + sin x)]

Now LHS = sin x + A sin x + B cos x = (1+A) sin x + B cos x.

Coefficient of cos x: B = B-A → 0 = -A → A = 0.
